source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved final panel is saved as the finished raster artwork.
source.notes: All step frames should be cropped from the same generated contact sheet so the can body, spout, handle, sprinkler rose, water drops, flower decal, and shadow stay consistent.

process_strategy: Use one six-panel contact sheet that builds the watering can from light ellipses and guides to the can body, handle, spout, rose, water drops, decal, restrained color, and final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: rounded can body
final_elements.description: A squat rounded watering can body with an oval top opening.

final_elements.name: top rim and neck
final_elements.description: A small oval rim and short neck sitting on top of the can.

final_elements.name: curved handle
final_elements.description: A large C-shaped handle attached to the right side of the can.

final_elements.name: long spout
final_elements.description: A tapered spout reaching from the left side of the can.

final_elements.name: sprinkler rose
final_elements.description: A rounded sprinkler head with small holes at the end of the spout.

final_elements.name: water drops
final_elements.description: A few falling drops beneath the sprinkler rose.

final_elements.name: flower decal
final_elements.description: A simple flower mark on the front of the can.

final_elements.name: restrained teal color
final_elements.description: Loose teal colored-pencil shading on the can body, handle, and spout.

final_elements.name: soft cast shadow
final_elements.description: A pale graphite shadow grounding the watering can.

frames.visible_job: Sets the rounded can body with a light squat oval and simple side guides.
Clarifies the can body, adds the top rim and neck, and places the lower base curve.
Adds the large curved handle on the right and the tapered spout on the left.
Adds the sprinkler rose, tiny holes, and a few falling water drops.
Adds a small flower decal, restrained teal pencil, and a light cast shadow.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing body, rim, handle, spout, rose, water drops, flower decal, color, and shadow marks without adding new parts.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No can contour, rim, handle, spout, sprinkler rose, water drop, flower decal, shadow, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The watering can must keep the same side-view pose and proportions in every frame.
The final image must not add hands, plants, garden tools, lettering, background scenery, or extra props absent from the process frames.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this contact sheet.
